mapper.select: select id, lot_no, process_code, process_name, seq, process_source, create_time from ticket_lot_process_sequence where lot_no = #{lotNo} order by seq asc
mapper.insert:
insert into ticket_lot_process_sequence (lot_no, process_code, process_name, seq, process_source, create_time) values
(#{item.lotNo}, #{item.processCode}, #{item.processName}, #{item.seq}, #{item.processSource}, now())
